codeReview.summary: Global search implementation covers all three milestones: server endpoint (POST /search), TUI overlay (SearchScreen ModalScreen), and search navigation (jump-to-tab on result select). No blocking issues found.

sharedStateObservations.observation: SearchScreen uses self.app.call_from_thread() instead of self.call_from_thread() due to pyright type stubs not exposing the method on ModalScreen. This is functionally equivalent at runtime.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: pyright reports 0 errors with this approach.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Ctrl+/ is not a valid Textual binding name; Ctrl+\ (ctrl+backslash) is used instead. Documented in library note.

summary: Global search milestone implementation is complete. All validators green (557 tests, 0 pyright errors, 0 ruff errors). Services layer, server endpoint, client method, TUI overlay, and navigation are all implemented and tested.
